title: Strategic Knowledge Validation Decision
description: Governed admission decision for a strategic knowledge artifact candidate.

decision_id.description: Deterministic identifier for this validation decision artifact.

trace_id.description: Trace identifier linking this decision to the broader workflow trace.

span_id.description: Span identifier for the strategic knowledge validation decision operation.

artifact_id.description: Identifier of the strategic knowledge artifact that was evaluated.

artifact_type.description: Strategic knowledge artifact family for the candidate artifact.

schema_version.description: Schema version declared by the candidate artifact.

evaluated_at.description: UTC timestamp for when gate evaluation completed.

validator_version.description: Version of the Strategic Knowledge Validation Gate implementation.

schema_valid.description: Whether the candidate artifact conforms to its declared artifact contract schema.

source_refs_valid.description: Whether all declared source references resolve to registered source catalog entries with admissible status.

artifact_refs_valid.description: Whether declared artifact references resolve to known artifacts when references are present.

evidence_anchor_coverage.description: Coverage ratio of structurally valid evidence anchors required for trust evaluation.

provenance_completeness.description: Completeness ratio for required provenance fields in the artifact payload.

trust_score.description: Deterministic trust score computed from governed sub-signals.

issues.description: Structured governance and validation findings collected during evaluation.

system_response.description: Admission control outcome for the candidate artifact.
